CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT INGENIO, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF VADIMIR OSTANIN'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED TO THE 13 AND 14 AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN MADE. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE 18TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR THERE IS NO SUCH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE. THE 4TH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE ALLEGES MULTIPLE GROUNDS FOR RELIEF. IT IS, AS A CONSEQUENCE, UNCERTAIN AND THE COURT IS NOT AWARE OF ANY AUTHORITY THAT OBLIGATES PLAINTIFF TO ADVISE DEFENDANT OF A RIGHT TO OVERTIME. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE DEMURRER TO THE 5TH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE, LACHES, IS OVERRULED. THE DEMURRER TO THE 6TH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS THAT DEMONSTRATE A BASIS FOR THE DEFENSE OF UNCLEAN HANDS. THE DEMURRER TO THE 7TH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE IS SUSTAINED. THE FACTS ALLEGED DO NOT PROVIDE A BASIS FOR THE ALLEGED DEFENSE OF FAILURE TO MITIGATE DAMAGES. TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF VADIMIR OSTANIN'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: The demurrer is sustained to the 13 and 14 affirmative defenses, no opposition having been made. The demurrer is sustained as to the 18th cause of action for there is no such affirmative defense. The 4th affirmative defense alleges multiple grounds for relief. It is, as a consequence, uncertain and the Court is not aware of any authority that obligates plaintiff to advise defendant of a right to overtime. Sustained with 10 days leave to amend. The demurrer to the 5th affirmative defense, laches, is overruled. The demurrer to the 6th affirmative defense is sustained with 10 days leave to amend to plead facts that demonstrate a basis for the defense of unclean hands. The demurrer to the 7th affirmative defense is sustained. The facts alleged do not provide a basis for the alleged defense of failure to mitigate damages. Ten days leave to amend. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/xAM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
